headline: Is Square’s AI‑Driven Efficiency And New Merchant Wins Altering The Investment Case For Block (SQ)?
summary: In March 2026, The Pancake Parlour and The Fish Guy announced they had adopted Square’s unified commerce and ecommerce solutions, while Block detailed how its AI agent Goose has sharply increased productivity and supported a large workforce reduction as part of a two-year transformation. Together, these developments highlight Block’s push toward AI-driven efficiency and deeper integration of Square’s platform across hospitality and specialty retail operations. Next, we’ll examine how Block’s...
